CheckTitle: Check if E2E Networks public or addon IPs are attached
Description: This check verifies that E2E Networks public and addon reserved IP addresses are attached to a resource, identifying orphaned addresses that remain internet-reachable without an owner.
Risk: Orphaned public IPs remain internet-reachable resources that can be misused or reassigned without ownership controls.

Recommendation.Text: Attach orphaned public or addon IPs to a resource, or delete them to remove unused internet-reachable addresses.
